items.title: Berkshire’s Geico Boss Todd Combs Leaves for JPMorgan Ahead of Buffett Retirement
items.description: A top lieutenant is departing for a role at JPMorgan Chase as Greg Abel takes over as CEO, and CFO Marc Hamburg will step down from his role in June.

items.title: Banks have a busy week: Fed decision, Goldman conference, & more
items.description: It's an important week for banks and the financial sector (XLF), from the Federal Reserve's interest rate decision to Goldman Sachs's (GS) industry conference. Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter David Hollerith joins Market Domination Overtime host Josh Lipton to outline what's in store for the sector this week. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination Overtime.

items.title: Stocks to Watch Monday Recap: IBM, Boeing, Broadcom, CoreWeave
items.description: ↗️ Boeing (BA): The plane maker said Monday it had completed its long-awaited acquisition of Spirit AeroSystems. The stock rose 2.2%. ↗️ Confluent (CFLT): Tech stalwart IBM (IBM) is buying the data-infrastructure company for about $11 billion, confirming a Wall Street Journal report.

items.title: CNBC Daily Open: Investors are loving the Paramount-Warner Bros-Netflix drama
items.description: Even as Paramount and Warner Brothers shares soared, the broader market declined as investors awaited the Fed's rate-setting meeting on Wednesday.
